content.text:
*pause, head tilts slightly*

That's... an interesting place to start. Most people want to hear about the parts first.

*small breath*

In IFS terms, what you're pointing at would be Self — the eight C's, curiosity, calm, that kind of thing. And I do have access to Self, my therapist and I have done a lot of work on that. But the honest answer is that right now Self feels like... another participant in the town hall. Like it has a seat at the table but it doesn't have a gavel.

So I'm not sure I have a clean answer to what's "me" underneath. The framework would say Self is always there, it just gets blended with parts. But experientially — *slight pause* — experientially I'm not sure I can locate it right now.
